_purpose: Enum of board roles used in SLD distribution_hierarchy[].board_role field. Schema-aligned with sld-ir.schema.json.

board_roles.label: Main Switchboard (MSB)
board_roles.description: Top-level board fed directly from the utility intake. Distributes to sub-DBs. The single root of the distribution hierarchy (parent_board_id == null).

board_roles.label: Sub-Distribution Board (SDB)
board_roles.description: Intermediate board fed from MSB or another upstream board. Distributes to final circuits or further sub-boards. Typical for multi-floor or zoned buildings.

board_roles.label: Panel (US convention)
board_roles.description: US/NEC equivalent of sub-distribution board. Single-board scope; serves final circuits in a defined area (tenant, floor, zone). Fed from MSB or higher-level panel.

board_roles.label: Sub-Panel (US convention)
board_roles.description: US/NEC equivalent of a downstream sub-DB. Fed from a main panel; serves tenant or zone loads. Secondary distribution point in multi-level schemes.
standards: NEC 230.71 (service disconnects); sub-panel main switch is not a service disconnect

board_roles.label: Fire Alarm Panel
board_roles.description: Dedicated life-safety panel for fire alarm detection and notification circuits. No upstream RCD per IEC 60364-5-56 §560 / BS 7671 §560 / KS 1700 §560 / NEC 760.

board_roles.label: Life-Safety Panel (emergency lighting / fire pump / smoke control)
board_roles.description: Dedicated panel for emergency lighting, fire pump, or smoke control. Requires dedicated supply (mains or battery-backed per BS 5266 / IEC 60364-5-56 / NEC 700/695).

board_roles.label: UPS Distribution Panel
board_roles.description: Downstream of UPS output. Serves uninterruptible loads (typically IT / process / data / critical manufacturing). May have dedicated grounding and isolation from mains return path.
